name: Orbit Rules
description: Stateless deterministic rules used by the orbit-observer and orbit-resolver skills. Provides 5 tools: normalize_phone, canonicalize_email, domain_class, lid_to_phone, fuzzy_match.

description.description: Plugin reads two optional env vars. WACLI_SESSION_DB overrides the path to the whatsmeow_lid_map SQLite (default: ~/.wacli/session.db). ORBIT_RULES_DEFAULT_COUNTRY is the ISO country used for ambiguous local phone numbers (default: IN — India, since V0 founder is there).
